overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the Toussaint region. The character walks from a lakeside meadow with a fairytale castle in view, through grassy hills, and into a cobblestone village street. Bright summer afternoon lighting with vibrant colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside meadow with fairytale castle overlook

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeshore with swords on back, approaching the water's edge with the castle ahead

notable_agents.action: armored companion walking alongside Geralt, gesturing with right hand

entered.detail: large fairytale castle with multiple spires perched on a rocky cliff
small waterfall cascading down rocks into the lake
calm reflective water surface along the shoreline
ancient stone wall ruins covered in greenery

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a lush lakeside meadow with the magnificent Toussaint castle dominating the background across the water. Wildflowers dot the grass in the foreground while a companion walks alongside, gesturing as they move along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered stone buildings

events.description: turns left away from the lake and begins ascending the grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through tall grass and wildflowers, moving away from the lake toward the village

notable_agents.action: companion continuing to walk alongside up the grassy slope

entered.detail: colorful medieval houses with red tile roofs and wooden beams
rocky cliff face with patches of greenery

segments.scene_description: The character turns inland and ascends a grassy hillside, leaving the lake behind. The castle shifts to the right side of the frame as colorful village houses appear on the left, partially obscured by dense green foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main street with colorful houses

events.description: transitions from grassy terrain onto cobblestone village street
encounters a white horse being led by a villager on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street through the village, passing other villagers

notable_agents.action: white horse standing on the path edge, held by a villager
villager in dress walking ahead on the cobblestone path

entered.detail: worn cobblestone street winding through the village
large two-story building with stone stairs and blue awnings
circular stone well structure on the village green

segments.scene_description: Entering the village proper, the ground becomes cobblestone as Geralt walks past a stone well and colorful buildings. Other villagers appear, including a woman walking ahead and a white horse standing to the left. The castle disappears behind the village structures as the street narrows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, fairytale lakeside vista into the intimate confines of a colorful village street. It begins with Geralt walking through a lush meadow dotted with wildflowers, the magnificent Toussaint castle dominating the horizon across the water. As the party turns inland and ascends a grassy hillside, the lake recedes and the castle shifts to the right of the frame, while vibrant houses begin to emerge from behind dense green foliage. The scene then transitions from grass to cobblestone as the camera enters the village proper, passing a stone well and a white horse. Finally, the street narrows and the castle disappears behind the colorful buildings as the camera follows a woman walking ahead through the bustling settlement.
